LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT HARI DILLON MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM DEFAULT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED DUE TO COUNSEL'S AFFIDAVIT OF FAULT. DEFENDANT'S COUNSEL TO PAY REASONABLE COMPENSATORY LEGAL FEES AND COSTS TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL IN THE AMOUNT OF $700.00. ANSWER TO BE FILED WITHIN FIVE DAYS. NOTICE IS WAIVED BY COUNSEL. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR BOND IS DENIED. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Notice Of Motion For Relief From Default, Appendix Of Secondary Authority In Support Of Motion For Relief From Default
Off Calendar Jun-24-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HARI DILLON Motion for Relief from Default. Appearances: Mark Hooshmand, Esq. Attorney at Law, (415) 835-5900, appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Peter M. Rehon, of Rehon & Roberts, (408) 494-0900, appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted due to counsel's affidavit of fault. Defendant's counsel to pay reasonable compensatory legal fees and costs to plaintiff's counsel in the amount of $700.00. Answer to be filed within five days. Notice is waived by counsel. Plaintiff's request for Bond is denied. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
